scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run --filter @workspace/devprep build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:libs && bun run --filter @workspace/devprep typecheck && bun run --filter @workspace/scripts typecheck
scripts.generate:question: cd content-gen && CONTENT_TYPE=question bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:flashcard: cd content-gen && CONTENT_TYPE=flashcard bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:coding: cd content-gen && CONTENT_TYPE=coding bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:exam: cd content-gen && CONTENT_TYPE=exam bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:voice: cd content-gen && CONTENT_TYPE=voice bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:all: cd content-gen && TARGET_CHANNEL=javascript COUNT=1 bun run generate-content.mjs
scripts.generate:parallel:dry: cd content-gen && DRY_RUN=true bun run generate-all-parallel.mjs
scripts.generate:parallel:batch: cd content-gen && COUNT=2 bun run generate-all-parallel.mjs
scripts.generate:parallel:fast: cd content-gen && CONCURRENCY=15 bun run generate-all-parallel.mjs
scripts.deploy:cf: bun x wrangler pages deploy artifacts/devprep/dist/public
scripts.deploy:cf:build: bun run build && bun run deploy:cf
scripts.deploy:cf:preview: bun x wrangler pages deploy artifacts/devprep/dist/public --branch preview
scripts.cf:dev: bun x wrangler pages dev artifacts/devprep/dist/public
